Large apple tree, produces each year, near corner of Stockholm and Chalfant. Unknown type, appears ripe in mid September. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

Two or more old Cornelian Cherries, mostly in the shade of bigger trees on the West side of North Park, near the wall of the convent. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Elderberry along Doan Brook just next to bridge, northeast side. Look out for poison ivy, but otherwise within reach. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

Bitternut Hickory trees near South Woodland and South Park and also along West Park near the trail. Beat the Squirrels for a rare buttery treat! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
Shagbark Hickory in yard on the corner of West Park and Shaker. Some of the fruit falls on the Sidewalk. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

Osage Orange trees along stone wall, south side of Fairmount. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

Paw Paw planted in meadow just next to the bridge over Doan Brook. Looks like a grafted variety with root suckers, might pollinate? Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
Pear, possibly seedling, in front yard. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-unknown.
Persimmon Tree, bears fruit mid sept-oct. Make sure it is good and ripe once you have permission! Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Serviceberry Shrubs behind plaza, at least 5 of them within a stones throw of each other. Beat the birds, berries are good! Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-unknown.
Several Serviceberry trees planted along Fernway, decent yield in Early Mid June if you beat the birds Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-unknown.
